query_name: 検証_TPマッチング_来店店舗数_顧客分布
query_string:
with order_log as (
  select
    customer_id
    , business_date
    , order_id
    , shop_no
    , shop_name
    , area_name
  from 
    _integration_datamart.cls_order_detail as t0
  left join 
    _integration_datamart.mst_shop as t1
    on t0.property_id = t1.property_id
  where
    customer_id in (
      select distinct customer_id from _integration_datamart.cls_order_detail 
        where time >= td_time_parse('2022-12-01', 'jst') and time <= td_time_parse('2025-12-01', 'jst')
    )
    and
    t0.time >= td_time_parse('2024-12-01', 'jst')
    and t0.time <= td_time_parse('2025-12-01', 'jst')
  group by 1,2,3,4,5,6
)

, agg_order_count as (
  select
    customer_id
    , shop_no
    , shop_name
    , area_name
    , count(distinct order_id) as order_count
    , max(business_date) as latest_business_date
    , max_by(shop_no, business_date) as latest_shop_no
    , max_by(shop_name, business_date) as latest_shop_name
    , max_by(area_name, business_date) as latest_area_name
  from
    order_log
  group by
    1,2,3,4
)

, agg_shop_count as (
  select
    customer_id
    , count(distinct shop_no) as shop_count
  from
    order_log
  group by
    1
)

, agg_order_rn as (
  select
    t0.*
    , t1.shop_count
    , row_number() over (partition by t0.customer_id order by order_count desc, latest_business_date desc) as order_count_rn
  from
    agg_order_count as t0
  left join
    agg_shop_count as t1
    on t0.customer_id = t1.customer_id
)


select
  shop_count as "来店店舗数"
  , count(distinct customer_id) as "顧客数"
from
  agg_shop_count
group by
  1
order by
  1
